teacher.method: order-blinded per-trailer excitement (0–100); the teacher never sees a trailer's ordinal, title, date, or movie — only the comment text

student.head: numpy Ridge (L2 linear regression)
student.runtime: onnxruntime + tokenizers + numpy — torch-free, no API call

validation.cv: GroupKFold by movie (a movie's trailer #1 can't leak into the fold scoring its #4)

takeaway: A regex/lexicon proxy is blind to the decay (~49%, a coin flip) because it's semantic — trailer fatigue, sarcasm. The distilled student reproduces the validated finding through the shipped runtime path at ~zero marginal cost.
